title: The Kentucky Derby
writer: Charles T. Dazey, George C. Hull
actors: Reginald Denny, Lillian Rich, Emmett King
plot: Dirty work is afoot in old Kentucky when a rival decides that his horse will have a better chance of winning if the son of the owner isn't around, so he has him shanghaied onto a tramp freighter and gets the jockey in his debt thr...
